text: Lesson 101
A card from Jimmy
Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 先听录音，然后回答这个问题。

text: Does grandmother seem pleased to get a card from Jimmy? Why/Why not?
zh: 奶奶收到吉米的明信片高兴吗？为什么高兴或为什么不高兴？

text: Read Jimmy's card to me please, Penny.
zh: 佩妮，请把吉米的卡片念给我听听。

text: 'I have just arrived in Scotland and I'm staying at a Youth Hostel.'
zh: “我刚到苏格兰，现在住在一家青年旅舍。”

text: Eh?
He says he's just arrived in Scotland.
He says he's staying at a Youth Hostel.
zh: 他说他住在一家青年旅舍。

text: You know he's a member of the Y.H.A.
zh: 你知道他是青年旅舍协会的会员。

text: The what?
The Y.H.A., Mum.
The Youth Hostels Association.
What else does he say?
'I'll write a letter soon.
I hope you are all well.'
What? Speak up, Penny.
I'm afraid I can't hear you.
He says he'll write a letter soon.
He hopes we are all well.
'Love, Jimmy.'
Is that all?
He doesn't say very much, does he?
can't write very much on a card, Mum.
zh: 妈，明信片上写不了太多字。
